## Skill Update

**Skill:** `skills/SKILL-NAME`

## Summary

<!-- What changes are you making and why? -->

## Type of update

- [ ] Bug fix (wrong code, outdated regulation, broken link)
- [ ] Improved instructions
- [ ] Added references / scripts
- [ ] Updated evals
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] Changes are focused and minimal
- [ ] `SKILL.md` is still under 500 lines
- [ ] `metadata.version` bumped (patch / minor / major as appropriate)
- [ ] `VERSIONS.md` updated to match
- [ ] No real PHI; no invented codes; no fabricated regulatory citations
- [ ] Tested locally with at least one AI agent

Closes #
